text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Mile Championship, and powerful
runners Biko Pegasus and Hishi Akebono will be
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is feeling nervous, but the three of
them wish each other a good race and do a
pre-race ritual together to get ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her spirits lifted, Fuji Kiseki is ready for
anything. The race begins.
